title: SpanzelCraft
description: Fun and adventure! This modpack is meticulously curated and tweaked to bring the most life to your world! All wrapped in the crisp Whimscape pixel-art style ♥
body:
![SpanzelCraft Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f0abbe8df342bd11160e0b2ede9e7ce67feb89c.png)

Welcome to SpanzelCraft! This Minecraft modpack is meticulously curated, tweaked and maintained by me, Spanzel! Fun and adventure in a lively world are at the forefront of this collection, all while being presented in that beautiful nostalgic Whimscape style ♥

This modpack aims to bring joy and life to Minecraft through various mods, resourcepacks and shaders. These are all tweaked to produce lively colors, extra effects in the world (both for your eyes and ears to enjoy) and many more animations for you and the creatures that inhabit the world with you.

Here's a list of some additions that await you inside _(be sure to also [check the changelog](https://modrinth.com/modpack/spanzelcraft/changelog) for any extra additions over time)_:

**Graphical Enhancements**

- [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) ► _(Adds shadows and reflections to Minecraft)_
- [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) ► _(All mob animations redone in the Minecraft cinematic trailer style)_
- [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality) ► _(Adds additional particle effects to the world)_
- [Whimscape Resourcepack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape) ► _(Gives Minecraft a whimsical artstyle, includes Leaves & Fresh Animations addons)_

![Shaders & Whimscape](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82f6bf277f82b217ee67b31f92c8e93834e78467.jpeg)

**World Enhancements**

- [AmbientSounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds) ► _(Adds things like birdsong and rustling leaves to forests and seagulls to seashores)_
- [BetterNether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether) ► _(Overhauls the Nether, adding additional mobs and biomes)_
- [Falling Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves) ► _(Particle leaves gently fall from trees)_
- [Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps) ► _(Each surface creates its own footstep sound)_
- [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered) ► _(Adds echoes and reverb to stoney surfaces, and muffles sounds behind walls)_

![BetterNether](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/093c3dc8d732a57aa2d4127969560faae3a3185f.jpeg)

**Player Enhancements**

- [3D Skin layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers) ► _(Transforms all playerskin details to 3D objects)_
- [Eating Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation) ► _(Adds sprite animations for edible and drinkable items)_
- [First-person Model](https://modrinth.com/mod/first-person-model) ► _(You can see your own body in first person)_
- [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations) ► _(Adds many animations normally only seen in first person to third person)_
- [Sit](https://modrinth.com/mod/bl4cks-sit) ► _(Lets you sit on stair and slab blocks by right-clicking, shift to stand up)_

![Fresh Animations, Roughly Enough items & Sit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65373ca2f11a5b1be447b2766c8be04a075adff4.jpeg)

**Experience Enhancements**

- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) ► _(Adds a bit of functional details to your hunger bar)_
- [Better Third Person](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-third-person) ► _(Camera can now turn around your character)_
- [BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3) ► _(Streamlined, easier to read version of the F3 debug overlay)_
- [Roughly Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei) ► _(Adds all available blocks to the inventory screen)_
- [WI Zoom](https://modrinth.com/mod/wi-zoom) ► _(The ability to zoom in anywhere, use mousewheel to finetune)_
- [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) & [World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) ► _(Adds a map and minimap to Minecraft)_

![Xaero's World Map & BetterF3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/575d0b46a6d861f68cf31ae4c29cf69b591761a2.jpeg)

And several under the hood improvements to help speed Minecraft along. Enjoy!


Lastly, here are some handy shortcuts that are enabled by default in this modpack:

**Misc**
- **X** - Zoom
- **K** - Shaders on/off
- **,** - Hud Co-ordinates on/off
- **.** - Cycle Hud Co-ordinates verbosity
- **F7** - First Person body on/off

**Map & Minimap**
- **M** - Fullscreen map on/off
- **N** - Minimap on/off
- **B** - Add new waypoint at current location
- **+** - Add temporary waypoint (is removed after exiting world)
- **U** - List of all waypoints
- **TAB** - Reveals names on the minimap
- **Z** - Enlarge minimap

**Voice Chat**
- **V** - Voice Chat menu
- **G** - Voice Chat groups
- **H** - Voice Chat icons on/off

**In inventory**
- **Ctrl+O** - Roughly Enough Items on/off
_(this also adds shortcuts to the topleft to change weather, time of day and game mode)_
